use_cases: Landing page hero for AI-powered SaaS products
Hero section for developer tools and software platforms
Product introduction page for tech companies
Dark-themed landing pages for modern web applications
Full-screen hero with animated gradient backgrounds
ai_summary: A dark-themed hero section for AI/SaaS products featuring animated gradient blobs, a branded header with logo, and a prominent CTA button. The design uses a deep purple-black background with rotating, blurred gradient elements creating an abstract light effect. The component is suitable for modern tech product landing pages with its sleek, futuristic aesthetic and responsive layout.
